query:
UPDATE island_guides 
SET topThingsToDo = JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'title', 'Manta Ray Encounters',
    'description', 'Dharavandhoo is world-famous for manta ray season (March-October). Swim alongside these gentle giants in their natural habitat during guided snorkeling and diving expeditions.'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'title', 'Diving',
    'description', 'Explore pristine dive sites with vibrant coral gardens, tropical fish, sharks, and rays. Multiple world-class dive sites surround the island with varying difficulty levels.'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'title', 'Snorkeling',
    'description', 'Crystal-clear waters perfect for snorkeling directly from the beach. Encounter colorful reef fish, sea turtles, and occasionally manta rays without needing certification.'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'title', 'Island Hopping',
    'description', 'Visit nearby islands and atolls by speedboat to experience different cultures, pristine beaches, and unique local traditions across Baa Atoll.'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'title', 'Local Culture',
    'description', 'Immerse yourself in authentic Maldivian life. Visit local markets, interact with friendly residents, and experience traditional island hospitality and customs.'
  )
)
WHERE slug = 'dharavandhoo-baa'
